mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, code, avatar, description, system_prompt, greeting, model_code, temperature, max_tokens, output_format, memory_enabled, memory_window, version, status, sort_order, use_count, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_agent
AND status = #{status}
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_agent WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{excludeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_agent (name, code, avatar, description, system_prompt, greeting, model_code, temperature, max_tokens, output_format, memory_enabled, memory_window, version, status, sort_order, use_count, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{avatar}, #{description}, #{systemPrompt}, #{greeting}, #{modelCode}, #{temperature}, #{maxTokens}, #{outputFormat}, #{memoryEnabled}, #{memoryWindow}, #{version}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, 0, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_agent SET use_count = use_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
